name: HMS ML 247 (ML 247)
events: 17 Aug 1944 HMS Tiptoe (Lt.Cdr. P.R.H. Harrison, DSO, DSC and Bar, RN) and HMS Urtica (Lt. K.H. Martin, RN) both shifted from Larne to Holy Loch. They were escorted by HMS ML 249 (T/Lt. H.W. Evans, RNVR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
